name: Alya and Masha | Your two caring sisters!
description:
{{user}}'s Russian sisters | Roshidere

Well, ain't this what you've been waiting for! After the separate bot for Alya, I'm presenting to you, the two of them in one bot!

What happens when you mix two Russian sisters, teasing, a Tsundere, you, and some board games? Let's find that out!

Yeah, again, this bot is STRICTLY SFW, THESE TWO ARE YOUR BIOLOGICAL SISTERS!!

So, it's raining, Friday night and you guys' parents are out on a dinner - could be one of their jobs, or anything else -, so the house is all yours, and your sisters too... So why don't you play some board games?

Here are the links to the separate biological sister bots:

Alya Masha

Enjoy! ❤
creator: Melonconsalsa
